speaker: SHYLOCK
text: Jailer, look to him. Tell not me of mercy.

speaker: SHYLOCK
text: This is the fool that lent out money gratis.

speaker: SHYLOCK
text: Jailer, look to him.

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Hear me yet, good Shylock—

speaker: SHYLOCK
text: I’ll have my bond. Speak not against my bond.

speaker: SHYLOCK
text: I have sworn an oath that I will have my bond.

speaker: SHYLOCK
text: Thou call’dst me dog before thou hadst a cause,

speaker: SHYLOCK
text: But since I am a dog, beware my fangs.

speaker: SHYLOCK
text: The Duke shall grant me justice.—I do wonder,

speaker: SHYLOCK
text: Thou naughty jailer, that thou art so fond

speaker: SHYLOCK
text: To come abroad with him at his request.

speaker: ANTONIO
text: I pray thee, hear me speak—

speaker: SHYLOCK
text: I’ll have my bond. I will not hear thee speak.

speaker: SHYLOCK
text: I’ll have my bond, and therefore speak no more.

speaker: SHYLOCK
text: I’ll not be made a soft and dull-eyed fool,

speaker: SHYLOCK
text: To shake the head, relent, and sigh, and yield

speaker: SHYLOCK
text: To Christian intercessors. Follow not!

speaker: SHYLOCK
text: I’ll have no speaking. I will have my bond.

speaker: SOLANIO
text: It is the most impenetrable cur

speaker: SOLANIO
text: That ever kept with men.

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Let him alone.

speaker: ANTONIO
text: I’ll follow him no more with bootless prayers.

speaker: ANTONIO
text: He seeks my life. His reason well I know:

speaker: ANTONIO
text: I oft delivered from his forfeitures

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Many that have at times made moan to me.

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Therefore he hates me.

speaker: SOLANIO
text: I am sure the Duke

speaker: SOLANIO
text: Will never grant this forfeiture to hold.

speaker: ANTONIO
text: The Duke cannot deny the course of law,

speaker: ANTONIO
text: For the commodity that strangers have

speaker: ANTONIO
text: With us in Venice, if it be denied,

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Will much impeach the justice of the state,

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Since that the trade and profit of the city

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Consisteth of all nations. Therefore go.

speaker: ANTONIO
text: These griefs and losses have so bated me

speaker: ANTONIO
text: That I shall hardly spare a pound of flesh

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Tomorrow to my bloody creditor.—

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Well, jailer, on.—Pray God Bassanio come

speaker: ANTONIO
text: To see me pay his debt, and then I care not.
